shapes.name: TextBox 12
shapes.text: I’m a multidisciplinary designer with a passion for transforming concepts into compelling visual stories. With over a decade of experience across branding, UI/UX, and editorial illustration, I bring a strategic and empathetic eye to every project. My approach blends artistic intuition with design systems to craft meaningful user-centered experiences.

shapes.name: TextBox 35
shapes.text: A lifestyle campaign focused on redefining everyday wellness through natural beauty, real skin, and inclusive representation. The visuals reflect raw textures, lightness, and comfort to mirror the brand’s mission.

shapes.name: TextBox 21
shapes.text: Liceria & Co. needed a refreshed art direction that could blend editorial minimalism with vibrant digital accessibility. My task was to evolve their brand imagery across touchpoints — from packaging mockups to website visuals and lifestyle content

shapes.text: “Working with Olivia was a dream — her approach is thoughtful, modern, and always on-brand. Our campaign came to life in a way that truly reflected our voice.”

shapes.name: TextBox 35
shapes.text: This visual series was created for a boutique fashion label exploring softness, sustainability, and femininity. With a muted palette and textural styling, the direction speaks to comfort, confidence, and craftsmanship.
